titlestmt.titleproper: Preliminary Guide to the Aleksandr Ivanovich Spiridovitch Papers
titlestmt.author: compiled by Staff of Manuscripts and Archives

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday May 7, 2021 at 08:15

did.unittitle: Aleksandr Ivanovich Spiridovitch papers

descriptivenote.p: The materials are primarily in Russian, with some items in French and English.

did.abstract: The papers consist of writings and research materials dealing with Russian history, particularly the Romanov dynasty, Rasputin, and the origins of the Russian Revolution. Also included are materials on Peter the Great and the Jews in the Russian revolutionary movement.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright status for collection materials is unknown. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Aleksandr Ivanovich Spiridovitch Papers (MS 359). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Purchased from Mrs. Nina Spiridovitch in 1962.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These papers of General Aleksandr Ivanovich Spiridovitch consist of writings and research materials dealing with Russian history, particularly the origins of the Russian Revolution, and with the Romanov dynasty. Spiridovitch was the organizer and commander of Tsar Nicholas II's imperial bodyguard from 1906 until his retirement in 1916. His memoirs have been published in Russian (Zapiski Zhandarma, [1927?]) and French (Les dernières années de la Cour de Tzarskoie-selo, 1928.), and a draft of the Russian version is included among these papers. Also included are manuscript and typescript drafts of other writings by Spiridovitch, notes, documents, published volumes, scrapbooks of clippings and other printed matter, and lexicographical and biographical materials on many of the people mentioned in the writings.
The papers are only partially processed. English précis of the lexicographical and biographical materials in Boxes 1-2 have been provided.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Aleksandr Spiridovitch was an organizer and commander of Tsar Nicholas II's imperial bodyguard from 1906-1916.

did.unittitle: Inventory
Litsa "A" (Lexicographical and biographical materials: persons A-G.)
Litsa "D" (Lexicographical and biographical materials: persons I-Z, misc.)
Khronika tsarstrovania Imperatora Nikolaia II. (The Chronicle of the reign of Emperor Nicholas II.)
Papka Imperatora Nikolaia Vtorogo (Case of documents on life of Nicholas II, his family and the false pretenders of being members of the Tsarist family)
Khronika biografii Rasputina (The Chronicle of Rasputin's biography)

altformavail.head: Existence and Location of Copies
altformavail.p: A copy of this material is available in digital form from Manuscripts and Archives. Contact Manuscripts and Archives at mssa.assist@yale.edu to request access to the digital copy.

did.unittitle: Poslednie gody Tsarskosel'skogo Dvora Popravki i dopolnenia. (The last years of the court of Tsarskoie Selo. Corrections and additions.)

altformavail.head: Existence and Location of Copies
altformavail.p: A copy of this material is available in digital form from Manuscripts and Archives. Contact Manuscripts and Archives at mssa.assist@yale.edu to request access to the digital copy.

did.unittitle: Materialy i dokumenty k moim vospominamian. (Materials and documents pertaining to my memoirs)

altformavail.head: Existence and Location of Copies
altformavail.p: A copy of this material is available in digital form from Manuscripts and Archives. Contact Manuscripts and Archives at mssa.assist@yale.edu to request access to the digital copy.

did.unittitle: Primechania k istorii partii sotsial-revoliutsionerov i ee predshestuenikoo (Supplementary notes to the history on the party of Social Revolutionaries and their forerunners)

A.I. Spiridovitch, Revoliutsionnoie dvizherde v Rossii v period imperii, Partia sotsialistov revoliutsionerso u ee predshastoennikov, Vtoroie izdanie, dopolnennoie, Petrograd, 1918. (The revolutionary movement in Russia during the Empire. The Socialist-Revolutionary Party and her forerunner. The Second, enlarged edition. Petrograd, 1918, supplemented by many additional notes in Gen. Spiridovitch's hand.)

Gen. A.I. Spiridovitch, Rasputin , na mashinke sdolavleniami izdano po frantsuski. Po russki ne izdano (Gen. Spiridovitch, Rasputin , typewriter text with additional, published in French, not in Russian.)
Partrety revoliutsionnykh deiatelei po partiam (Portraits of the revolutionary functionaries as classified by the parties)
Dokumenty po isltskomi gradonachal'stvu (The Documents on governership of the city of Yalta)
Olshchestvennoic dvizhenie v Tsarstuovanie Imperatoza Nikolaia Vtorogo, 9 lektsii (The social movements during the reign of Emperor Nicholas the Second, 9 lectures)

"Poslednie gody Tsarkosel'skogo Dvora." na mashinke. Tom I. Izdano na franzieskom iazyke. Po russki ne izdano. ("The last years of the Court of Tsarskoie Selo." typewriter manuscript. Vol. I Published in French. Not published in Russian)

altformavail.head: Existence and Location of Copies
altformavail.p: A copy of this material is available in digital form from Manuscripts and Archives. Contact Manuscripts and Archives at mssa.assist@yale.edu to request access to the digital copy.

did.unittitle: Gen. A.I. Spiridovitch, Russkaia litteratura, Pushkin. Zametici. (Russian literature. Pushkin. Notes.)

Gen. A.I. Spiridovitch, Angliskii perevod knigi, Partia sotsialistov-revoliutsionerov i ee predshestvenniki . Rukopis' (English translation of the book, The Party of Socialist-Revolutionaries and Her Forerunners . Manuscript)
Papka velikago kniazia Kirilla Yladimirovicha. (The documents-case on Grand Duke Kiril Vladimirovich)
Materialy k Rasputinu rucmbe M-F [#] (Materials pertaining to book Rasputin . Papers M-F[#])

Gen. A.I. Spiridovitch, Poslednie gody Tsarskoie'skogo Dvora, na mashinke, Tom II. Izadano na frantsuskom iszyke. Po russki ne izdano. (The last years of the Court in Tsarskoie Selo," typed manuscript Vol, II. Published in French, Not in Russian)

altformavail.head: Existence and Location of Copies
altformavail.p: A copy of this material is available in digital form from Manuscripts and Archives. Contact Manuscripts and Archives at mssa.assist@yale.edu to request access to the digital copy.

did.unittitle: Materialy k Rasputinu . (Materials pertaining to the book Rasputin )
Papka chlenso doma Romanovykh. (The case of documents on members of the House Romanov)
Materialy k lstarii Bol'shevizma v Rossii. (Materials pertaining to the History of Bolshevism in Russia)
Istoria revoliutsionnoge dvizhenia v rossii of dekabristov do imperatora Nikolaia II. (The history of Revolutionary movement in Russian from Decembrists until Emperor Nicholas the Second.)
Le Nouveau Mercure 1717 (Reconstruction of Peter the Great's voyage in France after Le Nouveau Mercure of 1717).
Bibliografia Piotr Velikii Vo Frantsii v 1717 godu . Bibliography for ( Peter the Great in France in the year 1717 )
Peter the Great in Paris, Newspaper clippings.
Piotr Velikii v Parizhe (Peter the Great in Paris)
Konspekt Asarstuovania Imperatora Nikolaia II. (Synopsis on reign of the Emperor Nicholas II.)
Illiustratzii k dokladu Piotr Velikii v Parizhe v 1717 godu. (Illustrations for the lecture Peter the Great in Paris in 1717)
Dokumenty k trudu A.I. Spiridovich, "Piotr Velikii vo Frantsii v 1717 godu." (Documents pertaining to the study by A.I. Spiridovitch: "Peter the Great in France in the year 1717.")
Piotr Velikii vo Frantsii v 1717 godu. Peter the Great in France in the year 1717
Kistorii Partii Sotsial-Revoliutsionerov (Material pertaining to the history of the Socialist-Revolutionary Party.)
Perevorot v Rossii v Fevrale 17-go goda (Upheaval in Russia in Feb. 1917)
Gerei i tolpa (Heroes and masses) Lecture
Mliistuo Ministra Stolypina (The Murder of Tsarist Minister Stolypin)
Rossia i Memtsy (Russia and Germans) Lecture
Rol'russkoi zhenshchiny v nachem revoliutsionnom diuzhenii. (Participation of women in our revolutionary movement.)
Angliiski perevod Istorii bol'shevizma v Rossii . (The English translation of the book The History of Bol'shevism in Russia .)
Gen. Spiridovitch, Podlinnaya rukopis Rasputin . Izdammaya na frantsuskom iszyke. Po russki ne izdana. (Authentic manuscript of the book Rasputin . Published in France. In Russian not published.)
80-ie i 90-ie gody Bumagi Rachkovskogo i Vedomosti i Obsora Departamenta Politsii. (1800 & 1890 Papers of Rachkovski. Records and Survey of the Dept. of Russian Police.)

Evrei v russkom Revoliutsionnom Dvizhwnii. Evreistvo i fran-masonstvo Protokoly sionskikh Mudretsov. Evreiskii vopros v Rossii v poslednee tsarstvovanie. (The Jews in Russian revolutionary movement. Jewry and Fran-Masonry. Protocols of the Wise men of Zion. The Jewish question in Russia during the reign of Nicholas II.)
Politsia, Okhrana i Rozysk. Beloe Dvizhenie. (Police. Criminal Investigation Dept. The movement of Russian White Army.)
